headline: HCA Healthcare (HCA): A Target Cut, But Execution Still Gets Credit
summary: With stock buybacks of $9.21 billion in the 12 months through September 2025, HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) is among the 20 Stocks with the Biggest Share Buybacks. HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) received a revised analyst outlook on April 28 when Bernstein lowered its price target to $503 from $541 while maintaining a Market Perform rating. The […]
